topFindings.recommendation: Fill in label, description, category, and aliases so discovery and context labels stay clear.
Review fixed-width elements at 360px and 768px widths so panels and canvases do not overflow.

recommendations.title: Replace generic host fallback labels with tool-authored labels
recommendations.detail: Canvas-heavy tools should emit role, aria-label, and keyboard focus metadata directly in their canvas props so narration is specific before after-mount repairs run.

recommendations.title: Standardize icon-only and symbolic controls
recommendations.detail: Any button or role=button whose visible text is only an icon/symbol should carry an action-specific aria-label and, where useful, a title tooltip.

recommendations.title: Programmatically label sliders, selects, and text areas
recommendations.detail: The science and simulation tools use many controls; each range/input/select needs a label that names the parameter and unit.

recommendations.title: Mobile-review fixed-width canvases and panels
recommendations.detail: Fixed canvas and panel widths are expected in simulations, but tools with many fixed surfaces should be checked at phone widths for clipped controls and horizontal scrolling.

recommendations.title: Keep metadata complete
recommendations.detail: Short descriptions, categories, and aliases improve catalog search, active-tool context, and teacher station-building workflows.

tools.label: Digital Accessibility Lab
tools.desc: Audit websites and documents for WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance. Learn about digital accessibility by analyzing real-world content.

tools.label: Access Lens
tools.desc: Point your camera at the world: get a scene description read aloud (built for students who are blind or have low vision), re-read any text in large print, translate signs and handouts into your language, or investigate an object Socratic-style with an AI that asks questions instead of pronouncing answers.

issues.message: Tool registry category is missing or generic.

tools.label: Algebra Solver
tools.desc: Interactive algebra with equation builder, balance scale, and step-by-step AI solving

tools.label: AlloBot: Starbound Sage
tools.desc: A cozy sci-fi roguelite where AlloBot’s spells unlock as you master other STEM Lab tools. Cast by demonstrating what you learned.

tools.label: AlphaFold Explorer
tools.desc: Look up public AlphaFold DB protein structures by UniProt/accession, view them in Mol*, import downloaded AlphaFold result files, prepare AlphaFold Server or AlphaFold 3 local-code JSON, and guide students through classroom presets, grade-leveled lessons, biology-context investigation briefs, LMS-ready assignment packets, learner-support scaffolds, confidence/PAE interpretation, accessible claim-evidence-limit reasoning, local claim review, rubric feedback, and no automatic submission.

tools.label: Human Anatomy Explorer
tools.desc: Explore 10 body systems with layered anatomical visualization

tools.label: AppLab
tools.desc: Describe an app or science demo and AI builds it instantly. Edit the code, iterate, and export.

tools.label: AquacultureLab: Mussel Farm Sim
tools.desc: Pilot your skiff to your Bagaduce River lease. Deploy droppers, monitor water quality, harvest mussels, learn IALA-B buoyage + lease tiers + climate stressors in a 3D sim.

tools.label: Aquarium Lab
tools.desc: Build and run a virtual fish tank to learn the nitrogen cycle, water chemistry, fish anatomy, species care, and marine ecology.

tools.label: Arc City
tools.desc: Author functions, re-light a neon city, and battle across two function-powered Circuit Clash arenas.

issues.message: Tool registry description is missing or too short for catalog/context UI.

tools.label: Area & Perimeter Lab
tools.desc: Tile, compare, decompose, and investigate 2-D shapes while building area and perimeter reasoning.

issues.message: Tool includes fixed-width surfaces that need mobile visual review.

tools.label: Area Model
tools.desc: Visual multiplication with area model grids, distributive property, partial products, sound effects, and badges.

tools.label: Arithmetic Strategy Studio
tools.desc: Learn addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division through models, strategies, estimation, and mistake analysis.

tools.label: Art & Design Studio
tools.desc: Explore the math behind art: color theory, pixel art, symmetry, spirographs, fractals, generative design, and WCAG contrast.

tools.label: Assessment Literacy Lab
tools.desc: Learn how cognitive, personality, career, and employer tests actually work — build mock batteries, critique pseudoscience, coach yourself ethically for hiring tests.

tools.label: Night Sky & Astronomy
tools.desc: Earth & Space Science: constellations (with Wabanaki + cross-cultural sky traditions), moon phases, planets, seasons, stars, galaxies, eclipses, observing practice, light-pollution awareness. NGSS MS-ESS1 + HS-ESS1. Place-based for Maine + extendable. Printable observing checklists.

tools.label: ATC Tower
tools.desc: Air Traffic Control simulator — manage approaching aircraft, solve rate problems, and learn the math behind aviation safety.

tools.label: Auto Repair Shop
tools.desc: Diagnose, repair, and maintain a vehicle. OBD-II code reading, listening / fluid / visual diagnosis, 7 step-by-step repair scenarios (oil change, brakes, alternator, tires, air filter, A/C, timing belt), tool selection mini-game, safety modules (jack stands, electrical, refrigerant). Career data for ASE certification + Maine vocational pathways. Pairs with RoadReady (you DRIVE the car). Educational only — get certified at ase.com.

tools.label: Baking Lab
tools.desc: Explore the chemistry, ratios, and heat science that make baking work

tools.label: Math Manipulatives
tools.desc: Base-10 blocks, abacus, slide rule & place value quiz.

tools.label: Beehive Simulator
tools.desc: Colony dynamics, nectar flow, and the science of superorganisms

tools.label: Behavior Lab
tools.desc: Operant conditioning theory through a virtual Skinner box. 9 progressive levels: positive reinforcement, schedule effects (FR / VR / FI / VI), chained sequences, DRO timers, and classical conditioning (Pavlov). Plus a Schedule Sleuth (read cumulative-response curves) and Function Sleuth (FBA vignettes: attention / escape / tangible / sensory). Sister tool to PetsLab, which applies these mechanics to real-world pet training.

tools.label: BikeLab: Physics & Repair
tools.desc: Side-view bike physics sandbox + gearing math lab + hands-on repair simulator. Teaches Newton's laws, mechanical advantage, and real maintenance skills.

tools.label: BirdLab — I-Spy Ornithology
tools.desc: Interactive bird-spotting and species ID for adolescents. Layered habitat scenes with animated birds whose movement signatures double as field marks. Pairs with Cornell Lab's free Merlin Bird ID app for real photos and audio. Maine-relevant without being Maine-only.

tools.label: Brain Atlas Explorer
tools.desc: Explore an interactive brain model: regions, functions, neurotransmitter synapses, EEG waves, and a labeling quiz.

tools.label: Bridge Engineering Lab
tools.desc: NGSS MS-ETS1 + HS-ETS1 + HS-PS2. Truss stress simulator with adjustable span/height/load/material, bridge type comparison (beam/truss/arch/suspension/cable-stayed), materials database, force types, real-world case studies (Tacoma Narrows, Hyatt Regency, Tay, Silver, plus Brooklyn/Golden Gate/Akashi/Millau), engineering design cycle, AP-style quiz, printable design specs.

tools.label: Calculus
tools.desc: Riemann sums, derivatives, and guided discovery missions

tools.label: Cell Simulator
tools.desc: Explore 11 living micro-organisms in a simulated petri dish

tools.label: Cellular Automaton Lab
tools.desc: Explore 2-D Life-like worlds with custom B/S rules, predictive and scientific lenses, challenges, 17 classic patterns, dynamic grids, export, and population evidence - plus all 256 elementary 1-D Wolfram rules.

tools.label: Cephalopod Lab
tools.desc: The intelligence + behavior + camouflage biology of octopuses, squid, cuttlefish, and nautilus. Headline: Hunter Sim — play a cephalopod hunter, pick species + habitat + prey + tactic, run the camouflage minigame, time the strike, learn the real biology behind each species' adaptations.

tools.label: Chemistry Lab
tools.desc: Balance equations, explore reactions, stoichiometry, molecular models & lab safety

tools.label: Circuit Builder
tools.desc: Build series & parallel circuits with Ohm's Law

tools.label: Circuit Shelf
tools.desc: Build and run real electronic circuits in CircuitJS — Paul Falstad’s open-source simulator — wrapped in a Predict → Explore → Explain coach. Pick a challenge, lock in a guess before you wire anything, build it, then let the coach compare what you predicted with what the meters actually read.

issues.message: Tool registry category is missing or generic.

tools.label: Climate Explorer
tools.desc: Carbon calculator, renewables simulator, climate justice & solutions.

tools.label: Coaster Lab
tools.desc: Design a roller coaster in full 3-D, then earn the right to open it: predict speeds, g-forces, and bank angles from real physics, pass the inspection, ride onboard with checkpoint questions, and read your own telemetry like an engineer.

issues.message: Tool registry description is missing or too short for catalog/context UI.

tools.label: Companion Planting Lab
tools.desc: Grow a Three Sisters garden by season, manage soil and pests, and learn which plants help or harm each other.

tools.label: Coordinate Grid
tools.desc: Plot points, draw lines, calculate slope/distance/midpoint with sound effects and badges.

issues.message: Tool registry description is missing or too short for catalog/context UI.

tools.label: Data Lab
tools.desc: Real data science in CODAP — the Concord Consortium’s open data workspace — with an AlloFlow Socratic tutor beside it that asks questions about YOUR data instead of giving answers.

issues.message: Tool registry category is missing or generic.

tools.label: Data Plotter
tools.desc: Plot data, calculate regression & R²

tools.label: Data Studio
tools.desc: Build bar, pie, line, scatter, and histogram charts from your data and explore stats like mean, median, and trendlines.

tools.label: Material Decomposer
tools.desc: Break everyday compounds into their constituent elements and explore molecules, atoms, bonds, states of matter, and chemical reactions.

issues.message: Tool registry description is missing or too short for catalog/context UI.

tools.label: Virtual Dissection Lab
tools.desc: Peel anatomical layers and click organs across specimens (frog, fetal pig, earthworm, perch and more) with quizzes and flashcards.

tools.label: DNA Lab
tools.desc: Build, replicate, transcribe, translate, mutate, CRISPR-edit, forensics & more.

tools.label: Echo Navigator
tools.desc: Navigate virtual spaces using only spatial audio echoes. 3D first-person with Three.js. Emit clicks, listen for reflections off walls and moving agents, find the goal. Real HRTF binaural audio — wear headphones!

tools.label: Echolocation Lab
tools.desc: See the world through sound — bat sonar vision, sound wave physics, Doppler effect & acoustic ecology

tools.label: Economics Lab
tools.desc: Explore economics through supply & demand curves, personal finance, stock-market, business, and macro-policy simulations.

tools.label: Ecosystem Simulator
tools.desc: Model predator-prey dynamics with Lotka–Volterra equations, live canvas, sandbox mode, event injection, quiz & AI tutor.

tools.label: Epidemic Modeling Lab
tools.desc: Simulate disease spread with SIR/SEIR models, vaccination strategies, and outbreak maps.

tools.label: EvoLab — Evolution
tools.desc: Evolution and natural selection — three interactive simulators (Selection Sandbox, Galápagos Beak Lab, Phylogenetic Tree Builder) plus four quick labs covering Hardy-Weinberg, genetic drift, common ancestry, and the most common evolution misconceptions. Real-world relevance: includes Maine wildlife examples (snowshoe hare coat color, Maine finches, moose tick mortality).

tools.label: Fire Ecology & Indigenous Stewardship
tools.desc: Explore 65,000+ years of Indigenous fire knowledge, fire-adapted ecosystems, and forest management science.

tools.label: First Response Lab
tools.desc: Recognize and respond to medical emergencies. Hands-only CPR rhythm trainer, AED walkthrough, Stop the Bleed, choking, seizure, stroke, anaphylaxis. Disability-affirming peer response. Maine 911 + text-to-911. Educational only — get certified at redcross.org or heart.org.

tools.label: FisherLab: Boating & Fishing Sim
tools.desc: Pilot a Maine skiff. Learn IALA-B buoyage, COLREGS, charts, tides, fish identification, and responsible harvest decisions in an immersive 3D sim.

tools.label: SkySchool
tools.desc: Educational flight simulator — learn aerodynamics, navigation, and world geography by flying between real airports.

tools.label: Tool Forge
tools.desc: Author, validate, and preview new STEM Lab / SEL Hub plugins — describe one in plain language (AI builds a conforming plugin) or hand-code against the contract, with a live in-sandbox render-smoke and the same contract gate the deploy pipeline runs. Teacher / developer tool.

tools.label: Fraction Lab
tools.desc: Interactive fraction visualizer with pie/bar models, operations, equivalents, converter, fraction wall, and challenge mode.

tools.label: Fraction Lab
tools.desc: Interactive fraction visualizer with pie/bar models, operations, equivalents, converter, fraction wall, and challenge mode.

tools.label: Free Forms
tools.desc: Build your own World of Forms: fill an archetypal 3D structure (Venn, story mountain, fishbone…) with your OWN ideas, sculpt them, and get AI coaching on the whole composition.

tools.label: Function Grapher
tools.desc: Graph and explore mathematical functions interactively

tools.label: Galaxy Explorer
tools.desc: Explore galaxy types, stellar lifecycles, star classification, and metallicity in an interactive 3D Milky Way simulation.

tools.label: Game Design Studio
tools.desc: Build, play & learn 2D game design

tools.label: Geography Explorer
tools.desc: Interactive maps and quizzes for countries, capitals, continents, landmarks, distances, a 3D globe, and an AI quiz builder.

tools.label: Geometry Sandbox
tools.desc: Explore 3D shapes with interactive controls. Volume, surface area, challenge mode, and STL export.

tools.label: Geometry
tools.desc: Explore theorems, construct proofs, discover geometric relationships

issues.message: Tool registry description is missing or too short for catalog/context UI.

tools.label: graphCalc
tools.desc: Graph functions, analyze zeros and intersections, explore transformations

tools.label: Inequality Grapher
tools.desc: Visualize inequalities on a number line with notation, quiz, solver, badges & AI tutor.

tools.label: Kitchen Lab
tools.desc: Cooking & food safety life skills with culinary science: USDA safe temps + bacteria danger zone, knife cuts (dice / julienne / chiffonade / brunoise), heat techniques (sauté / sear / simmer / braise / roast / fry / steam), the Maillard reaction, top-9 allergens. Real-time recipe simulator + gamified cooking competition coming in v0.2. Sister tool to NutritionLab and BakingScience.

tools.label: Learning Lab
tools.desc: Explore optional learning, planning, reflection, accessibility, and education-career resources. Individual tools explain their purpose, limits, storage, and cited sources where relevant.

tools.label: Life Skills Lab
tools.desc: Essential knowledge for adulting — taxes, data literacy, contracts, records, transportation, job readiness, resume building, portfolio proof organization, interview practice, communication, time management, dental care, body care, sleep routines, medication labels, appointments, home safety, digital safety, food confidence, car care, laundry science, home systems, and critical thinking.

tools.label: AI Literacy Lab
tools.desc: How LLMs actually work, when they fail, how to prompt well, and when to use AI as a scaffold vs. let it substitute for your thinking.

tools.label: Logic Lab
tools.desc: Propositional Logic, Proofs & Reasoning

tools.label: Lumen
tools.desc: Study sources or analyze data in one evidence workspace where every claim stays connected to what supports it.

tools.label: Magnetism Lab
tools.desc: See invisible magnetic fields and learn how electricity makes them. Trace field lines with a live compass, build an electromagnet, spin a DC motor, crank a generator with Faraday’s law, sort magnetic from non-magnetic materials, and explore Earth’s own magnetic shield. NGSS MS-PS2 fields and forces.

tools.label: Microbiology Lab
tools.desc: NGSS MS-LS1 + HS-LS1 + HS-LS3 + HS-LS4. The microbial world: bacteria (beneficial + pathogenic), viruses (incl. COVID, flu, HIV, phages, measles), microscopy (light + phase + fluorescent + EM + AFM, plus a virtual-microscope slide-swap with rendered E. coli / Streptococcus / Paramecium / Plasmodium / T4 phage), antibiotic resistance evolution (interactive petri-dish selection-pressure sim), the human + soil + ocean microbiome, immune system + vaccines, fermentation (sourdough, yogurt, kimchi, sauerkraut, kombucha, cheese), classic case studies (Snow's 1854 cholera map as walkable interactive, Fleming's penicillin, MRSA, COVID/mRNA, FMT), AP-style quiz, printable lab safety + key microbes card.

tools.label: Migration & Wind Lab
tools.desc: V-formation aerodynamics, wind currents, bird migration routes & flight physics

tools.label: Molecule Lab
tools.desc: Explore chemistry with a 3D molecule viewer, compound creator, bond builder, 118-element periodic table, reaction simulator, and orbital clouds.

tools.label: Molecule Shelf
tools.desc: Explore real 3D molecular structures in Mol* — the viewer used by the world’s Protein Data Bank — from crambin and B-DNA to hemoglobin, an antibody, and the coronavirus spike. Rotate, zoom, and switch representations, with a Notice → Wonder observation coach beside it.

issues.message: Tool registry category is missing or generic.

tools.label: Money Math
tools.desc: Coins, bills, making change, grocery store sim, currency exchange, tips, budget, and personal finance.

tools.label: Moon Mission
tools.desc: Live a 10-phase Apollo mission from Kennedy to splashdown. Pick decisions at real Apollo moments (oxygen leak, landing fuel margin, abort thresholds), land the Lunar Module, collect rock samples, and decode the science of orbital mechanics + EVA. Includes Apollo historical facts and AI-customizable mission objectives from any source text.

tools.label: Multiplication Table
tools.desc: Interactive 12×12 grid with quiz modes, speed runs, streaks, badges & AI tutor.

tools.label: Music Synthesizer
tools.desc: Play a piano, build beats, and learn the science of sound with real-time waveform visualization.

tools.label: Number Line
tools.desc: Interactive number line with markers, 6 challenge types, skip counting, and AI tutor.

tools.label: NutritionLab — Nutrition Science
tools.desc: Adolescent-safe nutrition science: macronutrients, micronutrients, food labels, metabolism, digestion, common myths, food + mental health, eating-disorder awareness, Maine food reality, and registered-dietitian career pathways. Frame is physiology-first ("what your body uses food for"), not weight-loss. Sources cited inline: USDA FoodData Central, NIH ODS, Harvard T.H. Chan, AAP, NEDA.

issues.message: Tool registry category is missing or generic.

tools.label: Optics Lab
tools.desc: AP Physics 2 geometric + wave optics: ray diagrams, Snell's law, mirrors, lenses, double-slit interference, single-slit diffraction, polarization. Side-by-side draggable sims + calculators with show-the-math, sample problems, glossary, misconceptions, AP exam quiz, and AI-graded explanations.

tools.label: Oratory Lab
tools.desc: Real-time speech prosody visualization — pitch, pacing, volume & intonation practice

tools.label: Particle Lab 3D
tools.desc: Run fully 3D particle experiments with states of matter, gas laws, diffusion, adjustable collision cross sections, attraction, live measurements, and particle tracing.

tools.label: Science of Pets Lab
tools.desc: Companion-animal SCIENCE: physiology, ethology, nutrition, genetics, domestication, zoonoses, service animals. Cross-species pet training that assumes BehaviorLab's operant theory and applies it to real homes. UDL-aligned via Service & Support Animals coverage.

tools.label: Physics Simulator
tools.desc: Launch projectiles, explore kinematics, and learn Newtons laws

tools.label: Plate Tectonics
tools.desc: Explore tectonic plates, earthquakes, volcanoes, and continental drift.

tools.label: PlayLab
tools.desc: Football play-design: route geometry, coverage zones, open-receiver analysis

tools.label: PrintingPress
tools.desc: The Gutenberg-style screw press as a working simulation, plus the materials science, mechanical engineering, economics, history, and typography it touches. Compose your own type, ink the forme, pull the bar, see the impression. Built for interdisciplinary middle-school work. Sources: Gutenberg Museum (Mainz), British Library, Library of Congress, Smithsonian, Aldine Press scholarship, Eisenstein, Johns, Bringhurst.

tools.label: Probability Lab
tools.desc: Coin flips, dice, spinners, real sports stats & custom experiments.

tools.label: Angle Explorer
tools.desc: Measure and construct angles. Classify acute, right, obtuse, and reflex.

tools.label: Punnett Square Lab
tools.desc: Genetics lab: crosses, pedigrees, population genetics, DNA translation

tools.label: Raptor Hunt: Predator Physics + Biology
tools.desc: Three.js stoop simulator + deep science of raptor hunt mechanics: talon grip force, vision, flight physics, silent flight, and the DDT-era recovery story. 8 species roster from peregrine to harpy.

tools.label: Ratios, Rates & Proportions Lab
tools.desc: Explore ratio tables, double number lines, unit rates, percents, and proportional relationships.

tools.label: Renewables Lab
tools.desc: How each renewable energy source actually works — the physics and engineering. Solar PV, wind (Betz limit), hydro (head + flow), geothermal, CSP, wave/tidal, biomass, and storage. Live sliders driven by the real formulas. Cited to NREL, IEA, IRENA, DOE.

tools.label: RoadReady: Driver's Ed & Auto Science
tools.desc: Pseudo-3D driving simulator + US permit test + fuel efficiency physics. Maine state focus.

issues.message: Tool registry description is missing or too short for catalog/context UI.
Tool registry description is missing or too short for catalog/context UI.

tools.label: School Behavior Toolkit
tools.desc: Applied K-12 behavior practice — what school psychs and educators actually do with operant-conditioning science. PBIS three-tier framework, replacement behaviors mapped to FBA functions, setting events (the slow triggers most BIPs miss), Geoff Colvin's seven-phase Acting-Out Cycle for crisis de-escalation, and Restraint & Seclusion ethics anchored in Maine Chapter 33. Sister tool to BehaviorLab (which teaches the science) and Disability Voices in SEL Hub (which centers the people the field has been done to).

tools.label: Semiconductor Lab
tools.desc: Explore band gaps, doping, junctions, transistors, gates, I-V curves, wafer fab, LEDs, solar cells, quantum wells, memory & amplifiers.

tools.label: Sim Shelf
tools.desc: A shelf of PhET simulations — the most researched sims in education — wrapped in a Predict → Explore → Explain coach. Lock in a guess before you touch anything, experiment freely, then let the coach compare what you predicted with what you saw.

issues.message: Tool registry category is missing or generic.

tools.label: Singing Lab
tools.desc: Pitch training, vocal range, vibrato analysis, interval singing & music theory

tools.label: SkateLab
tools.desc: Skate / BMX physics: kickflips, halfpipe pumps, and gap jumps. Same physics that lands a 720.

tools.label: Solar System Explorer
tools.desc: Explore a 3D model of the Sun, 8 planets, and dwarf planets — fly to surfaces, view interiors, run missions, and learn Kepler's laws.

tools.label: Kepler Colony
tools.desc: Colonize an alien planet! Turn-based cooperative strategy where mastering science unlocks colony survival.

tools.label: Space Explorer
tools.desc: Roguelike missions across the solar system. AI-generated challenges, real science, and strategic resource management.

tools.label: Space Station
tools.desc: Float through the International Space Station and work a crew shift: run research, troubleshoot life support, practice low-g movement, explore a clickable 3-D map, and learn the engineering behind life in orbit. NGSS MS-ETS1 in Earth’s strangest laboratory.

tools.label: Statistics Lab
tools.desc: Inferential statistics: t-tests, ANOVA, correlation, regression, chi-square, non-parametric, power analysis. AP Psych / AP Bio focus. Transparent computation, plain-English results, APA write-ups, AI interpretation grader.

tools.label: Environmental Stewardship Campaigns
tools.desc: Cross-campaign launcher across multiple regions and biomes. 5 deep Maine campaigns plus 10 cross-region scenarios across all five mechanic families: fire (Yarralin Australia, Karuk Northern California), conservation (Yellowstone wolves, Akagera Rwanda lions), public health (Mumbai dengue, Liberia 2014 Ebola), watershed (Klamath River, Murray–Darling Basin), climate (Marshall Islands atolls, Bangladesh delta). Same universal mechanics taught through grounded regional case studies. Family Pairing Insights unlock as you complete Maine + cross-region scenarios in the same mechanic family.

tools.label: SwimLab
tools.desc: How swimming works (stroke physics + survival skills) plus what every swimmer should know about cold water, rip currents, ice, life jackets, and rescue. Visual stroke breakdowns, the science of buoyancy and propulsion, and the survival skills (back float, eggbeater, HELP, huddle) that actually save lives. Sources cited inline (CDC, USCG, AAP, NAA, ASAN, NOAA, USA Swimming, Cold Water Boot Camp). Educational only — find a Water Safety Instructor for actual swim training.

tools.label: ThrowLab
tools.desc: Sports physics: how spin, speed, and release point shape the ball's path

tools.label: Time & Schedule Lab
tools.desc: Link analog and digital clocks, model elapsed time, reason about schedules, and convert 12/24-hour time.

tools.label: Timeline Studio
tools.desc: Turn any reading — history, a biography, a science-discovery passage — into an interactive TimelineJS timeline. Paste or drop in text and the AI pulls out the dated events; scroll, zoom, and step through them. You can also build a timeline event by event yourself.

issues.message: Tool registry category is missing or generic.

tools.label: Titration Lab
tools.desc: Virtual titration lab with S-curve graphing, safety drills, incident simulator, equipment guide, and dilution calculator.

tools.label: Typing Practice
tools.desc: Keyboarding designed for students with disabilities — accommodations are the product, not a menu. AI-personalized passages, IEP-ready progress, no ads or racing.

tools.label: Unit Converter
tools.desc: Convert units with visual comparison, quiz, AI word problems, badges & keyboard shortcuts

tools.label: Universe Explorer
tools.desc: Journey through cosmic time from the Big Bang to heat death, exploring epochs, distance scales, galaxies, exoplanets, and dark matter.

tools.label: 3D Volume Explorer
tools.desc: Build 3D solids, solve volume challenges, and measure irregular objects with water displacement.

tools.label: Water Cycle
tools.desc: Live water cycle canvas plus Journey Mode: ride one droplet through evaporation, condensation, precipitation, collection, transpiration, and infiltration with real choices along the way.

tools.label: Wave Simulator
tools.desc: Animate sound and water waves across Free, Standing, Ripple Tank, Reflection, Longitudinal, Doppler, and Spectrum modes.

tools.label: Weather Systems & Forecasting
tools.desc: Explore fronts, pressure, humidity, wind, radar, station models, severe-weather hazards, and evidence-based forecasting.

tools.label: WeldLab — Welding & Metal Joining
tools.desc: Vocational welding simulator covering MIG / TIG / Stick / Oxy-Fuel processes, heat-input physics, weld bead geometry, defect identification, AWS welding symbols, OSHA-aligned PPE, and Maine career pathways (Bath Iron Works, EMCC welding program, AWS certification ladder). Real procedural and conceptual content for skilled-trades exploration — not a watered-down toy.

issues.message: Tool registry category is missing or generic.

tools.label: WriteCraft
tools.desc: Literary RPG — explore worlds, craft items, build structures, and battle through the strength of your prose.

tools.label: Zoom Gallery
tools.desc: Zoom deep into real, openly-licensed images — Smithsonian Open Access artifacts (CC0) and famous NASA photographs (public domain) — in OpenSeadragon, the viewer museums use. Magnify to the pixel: the Pillars of Creation, an Apollo bootprint, the Apollo 11 capsule, a coral fan. A Notice → Wonder coach sits beside the viewer.
